title: Baab (disambiguation)
content:
'''Baab''' could refer to either of the following individuals:

*'''[[Fema Baab/Legends|Fema Baab]]''', [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[Bajic sector/Legends|Bajic sector]] near the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]' end.
*'''[[Umjing Baab]]''', a fifteen-armed [[Rughja]] [[Musician/Legends|musician]].

{{Disambig}}
